subcodes.first_line: O hoary servant of the divine Path, give thanks unto God that thy black hair hath turned white as silver in this path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سالخورده سبیل الهی شکر کن خدا را که موی سیاه در این راه مانند سیم سفید شد
subcodes.subjects: @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
